dialogos.texto_en: Wow!\nThat is...
Ohhh...
I'm totally speechless...
It's completely different\nfrom an ordinary sunset...
Yeah, it's like a scene from a movie.
The view is just stunning! It looks like a postcard.
I have to thank you for suggesting this, Nino.\nThank you truly.
Teehee! I'm glad everyone likes it.
Indeed, it's a fitting scenery to end the day.
Since we're here,\nI wanted to see the Heart Rock during daylight and\nits beauty at dusk too.
I'm sure the night sky is beautiful too,\nbut we have to return to the hotel.
That's too bad.\nThere might be a beautiful starry sky\nsince there's no artificial light.
If you really want to see it...\nhow about staying here, Futaro?
N-no, we can't do that.
Oh, I think I'll go see the sunset from over there.\nIt'll probably look even more beautiful.
That's right, let's go.\nItsuki and Yotsuba, you too.
Huh?
O-oh, yeah, right!\nWe shouldn't intrude, should we!
Itsuki-san, Itsuki-san!
Huh?!\nNo, no, it's for the sunset!\nYou too, Yotsuba! Let's go!
Ah, okay...?
They gave us some lovey-dovey time.
W-well, I guess that's true.\nWe're free from any obstacles now.
...Hey.\nNow you can calm down and recharge from today too, Futaro.
Ah, well, recharging is good,\nbut since we're here,\nlet's watch the sunset too, okay?
Of course.
I'm glad that you are by my side and we can enjoy the\nview together, Futaro.
...Me too.\nThis way, I have another memory with you.
I already said it yesterday,\nbut before we get into a long-distance relationship,\nI want to make tons of memories with you, Futaro.
Memories that will fill the lonely times.
Nino...
For example, the photos we took today.
That you went as far as making that pose for me.\nIt's such a precious photo.\nI'll cherish it for the rest of my life.
Y-you're going to cherish it?\nAs for me, I feel like I want to make better memories\nand overwrite it.
Oh, was it that embarrassing for you?
I want to writhe just thinking about it.
But you still went along with it...\nThat means you like me, right?
...I wouldn't have done it for anyone else.
...It's embarrassing to hear that\nface-to-face, though.
I feel the same way.
But sometimes things\ncan't be understood without saying them.
I like you too, Futaro.
The truth is, I want to be with you forever.\nI want to accompany you to Tokyo.
But I know that's selfish of me.
Please let us create lots of memories together,\nso that I won't feel lonely.\nI want to send you off to Tokyo with a smile, Futaro.
(Will Nino really be able to send me off with a smile?)
(Nino thinks so highly of me.\n With her by my side,\n I can definitely overcome any difficulty...)
(However, even she\n must have her own worries regarding the future.)
(Besides, it's obvious to anyone who knows me that I am\n absolutely clueless when it comes to romance...)
Futaro?
It's nothing...\nI was just thinking that\nI need to be more responsible.
What's wrong all of a sudden? \nI think you're fine the way you are, Futaro.
I can't leave things like this.\nThis is my responsibility.
(Even if I'm clueless about romance,\n I have to show Nino what kind of man I am\n and try to ease her worries, even a little.)
(It's not about whether I can do it or not.\n I have to do it, no matter what.)
